status: FROZEN BEFORE PROSPECTIVE DATA — authoritative for protocol, analysis and verdict generation
central_question: Does the target droplet retain its own graded causal information through deep material turnover under the passive-copy C1c architecture, stored locally rather than recoverable equally from a geometric neighbour, a target-memory-masked environment, or the target-memory-removed global world?

gate_definitions.FEASIBILITY: n_valid_worlds >= 18 (geometrically eligible + deep snapshot reached + rest & deep assay geometry valid), at hard cap 96
gate_definitions.G_OWN_PERM: L own-dose held-out mean skill exceeds within-original-world dose permutation null at frozen p < 0.05
gate_definitions.G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION: L has strictly lower held-out loss than N, E (local env, target memory masked), Gm (global, target memory removed) AND B; each paired Student-t lower 95% bound > 0
gate_definitions.G_CAUSAL: deep own (intact-minus-erase) world-level lower CI > 0 AND own > sham AND own > neighbour AND lambda_plus-only ablation collapse AND fixed-mask directionally consistent AND >= 18 worlds
gate_definitions.G_INCREMENT: P-over-L or Gf-over-L improvement (interpretive only; NON-GATING; cannot rescue a failed G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION)
gate_definitions.DISTRIBUTED_ENV: G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION fails specifically because E or Gm own-dose skill lower CI > 0 while L does not strictly beat it (own-dose recoverable from target-memory-removed environment/global)

E.name: feasibility failure
E.authorized_wording: Fewer than 18 geometrically valid worlds were obtained at the hard cap; the turnover-survival question is not answerable on this family. No biological or scientific negative conclusion is drawn.

F.name: distributed / environmental access (locality invalidated)
F.authorized_wording: Own-dose information is recoverable at comparable skill from the target-memory-removed environment (E) or global (Gm) representation; target-local ownership is not established. This is distributed or environmental access, not local individual memory.

A.name: turnover-surviving causal individuation SUPPORTED
A.boolean: FEASIBILITY AND G_OWN_PERM AND G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION AND G_CAUSAL
A.authorized_wording: On the passive-copy C1c architecture, the target's own graded dose information is decodable from its local memory beyond a within-world null and beyond neighbour/environment/global representations, AND its own-erasure causally and specifically reduces its own feeding at deep turnover. This supports turnover-surviving, target-specific causal information storage. It is NOT a claim of identity, life, reproduction, heredity, active reconstruction, or evolution.

C.name: silent stored trace (storage without causal expression)
C.boolean: FEASIBILITY AND G_OWN_PERM AND G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION AND (NOT G_CAUSAL)
C.authorized_wording: Own-dose information survives locally at deep turnover, but a specific causal effect of own-memory erasure on own feeding is not established. This is a silent stored trace; causal individuation is not established.

B.name: passive local causal remnant; no individual memory
B.boolean: FEASIBILITY AND G_CAUSAL AND (NOT (G_OWN_PERM AND G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION))
B.authorized_wording: A local causal feeding effect survives deep turnover, but the target's own graded history is not distinguishable from neighbour/environment/global representations. This is a passively-compatible, algebraically-coupled local causal remnant, not individual memory. This is the outcome that would MOTIVATE (not confirm) an active-reconstruction architecture.

D.name: passive C1c turnover persistence fails
D.boolean: FEASIBILITY AND (NOT (G_OWN_PERM AND G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION)) AND (NOT G_CAUSAL)
D.authorized_wording: Neither own graded storage nor a specific causal expression survives deep turnover. Passive-copy C1c turnover persistence of target-specific information fails. This negative would MOTIVATE (not confirm) an active-reconstruction architecture.

notes: A positive direct feeding contrast alone can never select outcome A: G_CAUSAL is necessary but not sufficient; A also requires G_OWN_PERM and G_LOCAL_EXCLUSION.
G-full (Gf) nests target memory and is diagnostic only; L is never required to beat Gf.
Active reconstruction is not implemented and not launched in this mission; outcomes B and D only mark it as scientifically justified for a FUTURE, separately-authorized architecture.
